title: Broad Mean-Reversion Volatility Cap
hypothesis: A volatility-targeted mean-reversion branch can test whether the family works better with modest risk targeting and a broader selective basket rather than only with the smallest residual-cap basket.
why_different_from_retired: The retired mean-reversion work did not use a volatility target as the primary portfolio control, and the newer residual-cap branch focuses on basket size rather than volatility discipline.
This branch keeps the family selective while materially changing how risk is controlled once candidates are chosen.
success_criteria: The volatility-cap seed must pass the existing validation, holdout, and walk-forward promotion policy without exceptions before it can move toward paper-trade preparation.
If it fails, it must still produce enough evidence to decide whether risk-targeted mean reversion deserves space after the more selective branches.

stop_conditions.when: The volatility-cap seed passes validation, holdout, and walk-forward promotion rules under the current policy.
The seed records a terminal promotion decision and still fails the policy, especially on benchmark-relative split or walk-forward evidence.

bootstrap.objective: Run one volatility-targeted mean-reversion branch so the family can test whether a softer recycle cadence works better when the portfolio is risk-capped instead of made ultra-small.
bootstrap.branch_rationale: The residual-cap branch tests the smallest selective basket. This follow-up keeps mean reversion selective but asks whether volatility targeting and a slightly broader basket are a better fit for the family.
positive_hypotheses: A modest volatility target can stop mean reversion from oversizing into unstable short-horizon rebounds.
An eight-name basket can restore enough diversification to help split stability while still keeping the family more selective than the retired broad branches.

seed_stack.label: Residual-cap control
seed_stack.rationale: Reference control for the smaller selective mean-reversion branch.

seed_stack.label: Volatility-cap seed
seed_stack.rationale: Repo-backed mean-reversion branch that uses volatility targeting instead of an ultra-small basket as the main risk control.

campaign_path.label: Mean-Reversion Volatility-Cap Seed
campaign_path.purpose: Execute the volatility-targeted mean-reversion family and decide whether it should be promoted or retired.
